tasks.subject: Task 1: Commit the streaming throttle work in isolation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the already-written 33ms throttle as its own commit.

**Files:** commit ChatViewModel.swift + ChatViewModelTests.swift; leave MarkdownText.swift/MarkdownTextTests.swift modified (subsumed by Task 5).

**Verify:** swift test green; git show --stat HEAD lists exactly the two ChatViewModel files.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/DS4Control/ViewModels/ChatViewModel.swift", "Tests/DS4ControlTests/ChatViewModelTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["commit contains only the two ChatViewModel files", "swift test green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Confirm freeze cause + capture sample baseline (Step 0)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the freeze is the NSView layout-loop and record a before-baseline. No code changes.

**Verify:** /tmp/freeze-before.txt shows intrinsicContentSize/usedRect/ensureLayout frames.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "grep -E 'intrinsicContentSize|usedRect|ensureLayout' /tmp/freeze-before.txt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sample capture shows SwiftUI layout <-> IntrinsicTextView sizing spin", "top frames noted for the PR"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add Textual dependency + bump macOS floor to 15
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add gonzalezreal/textual (pin current latest) + product Textual on DS4Control; bump Package.swift .macOS(.v14)->.macOS(.v15).

**Verify:** swift build resolves + compiles; swift package show-dependencies | grep textual.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Package.swift", "Package.resolved"], "verifyCommand": "swift build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Package.swift declares .macOS(.v15) + Textual dep/product", "swift build resolves and compiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Implement splitBlocks + tests (MarkdownBlocks.swift)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure fence-aware splitBlocks(_:) -> (completed:[String], tail:String) + tests. Dependency-free.

**Verify:** swift test --filter MarkdownBlocksTests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/DS4Control/Views/MarkdownBlocks.swift", "Tests/DS4ControlTests/MarkdownBlocksTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter MarkdownBlocksTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prose splits on blank lines; last block is tail", "closed fence completed; open fence stays in tail", "empty -> ([], ''); no blank line -> ([], input)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rewrite MarkdownText.swift onto Textual
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace NSTextView renderer with Textual: MarkdownText (single-view), StreamingMarkdownText (block-split, .equatable frozen blocks), preprocess (deLaTeXed + tag strip), ds4MarkdownStyle() on .default. Rewrite MarkdownTextTests (keep deLaTeXed, add preprocess, drop internals) so the suite compiles.

**Verify:** swift build -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors; grep -rl 'import Textual' Sources | wc -l == 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/DS4Control/Views/MarkdownText.swift", "Tests/DS4ControlTests/MarkdownTextTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift build -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors && swift test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MarkdownText + StreamingMarkdownText render with selection", "preprocess strips tool_call/thinking + applies deLaTeXed", "only MarkdownText.swift imports Textual"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wire bubbles to pick render mode by isStreaming
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MessageBubble uses StreamingMarkdownText while streaming, MarkdownText when finished; ThinkingDisclosure renders via MarkdownText only when expanded; remove .fixedSize workarounds; tune blockSpacing to match.

**Verify:** swift build; manual stream + expand/collapse thinking.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/DS4Control/Views/ChatView.swift", "Sources/DS4Control/Views/MarkdownText.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift build -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors && swift test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["streaming uses StreamingMarkdownText; finished uses MarkdownText", "thinking built only when expanded", "no .fixedSize in ThinkingDisclosure; app runs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Prune obsolete renderer tests; confirm preprocess coverage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ensure no test references deleted NSTextView internals; deLaTeXed + preprocess coverage intact (most done in Task 5).

**Verify:** grep -rE 'attributedString|IntrinsicTextView|applyAttributed|headingPointSize' Tests -> none; swift test green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Tests/DS4ControlTests/MarkdownTextTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no references to attributedString/IntrinsicTextView/applyAttributed", "deLaTeXed + preprocess tests present and pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Verify (stress + smoke, light/dark) and confirm CI floor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove freeze-free + cheap on long replies, correct in light/dark, CI green. No CI YAML change needed (runner already macos-26).

**Verify:** swift format lint --strict; swift build -c release -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors; swift test; sample of a long stream shows no layout spin.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml", ".github/workflows/release.yml"], "verifyCommand": "swift format lint --strict --recursive Sources Tests && swift build -c release -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors && swift test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["long-reply stream responsive, no freeze vs baseline", "renders in light + dark", "strict lint + release build + tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Extend ChatViewModel flush loop: thinking cadence + in-flight guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flush thinking every ~250ms (8 ticks), content every 33ms; add MainActor updateInFlight guard (skip while outstanding, clear next turn); finish()/stop() force-drain. A few members internal for tests.

**Verify:** swift test --filter ChatViewModelTests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/DS4Control/ViewModels/ChatViewModel.swift", "Tests/DS4ControlTests/ChatViewModelTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift build -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors && swift test --filter ChatViewModelTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["content + thinking fully delivered after stream (no loss)", "force:false flush while updateInFlight does not mutate; force:true drains", "existing ChatViewModelTests still pass"]}
```
